title: Containment Lock Beta
subtitle: ENCRYPTED OVERRIDE // PUZZLE TWO
intro: Dr. Wu's backup lock channel was intercepted. The combination was encrypted before the network failed — decode the transmission to recover it.
puzzleBody:
DECRYPTION PROTOCOL
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
• Wu used a shift cipher: every letter was moved forward in the alphabet to encrypt the message.
• To decrypt, shift each letter backward by the same amount.
• The shift key equals the horn count on the Sector B extraction specimen (check your mission log or field notes).
• Write out the decoded message on paper — the lock combination is hidden inside it.
• Enter only the four digits when you find them.
solvedMessage: Transmission decoded. Use this combination on Containment Lock Beta.
